titleStmt.title: Letter from A. J. Cockington, 25 November 1915
Letters 1916-1923
titleStmt.author: A. J. Cockington

editionStmt.p: This work was originally published by Maynooth University in Ireland in 2017. In 2026 this data, stored in a relational database was extracted and converted into this TEI/XML document.

availability.p: This is an open access work licensed under Creative Commons Attribution NonCommercial 4.0 International license (CC BY-NC 4.0).

note.p: Letter from A.J. Cockington on behalf of the General Council of Medical Education & Registration for the United Kingdom concerning a list of names that were erased from the medical register at the session which was held on 24th November 1915.

msIdentifier.repository: Royal College of Physicians of Ireland

correspAction.persName: Royal College of Physicians of Ireland
correspAction.placeName: Royal College of Physicians, Kildare Street, Dublin, Ireland

projectDesc.p: The data in these XML files was generated based on a data dump from the Magellan database (https://github.com/Maynooth-Center-for-Digital-Humanities/Magellan). Each database record has been converted to a JSON file (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/json). The element section of the JSON file contains the TEI-encoded contents of the letters. The TEI XML has been cleaned and made well-formed using a Python script (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/src).

body.ab:
CONFIDENTIAL. General Medical Council Office,
299, Oxford Street,
LONDON, W. November 25, 1915. ERASURES FROM THE MEDICAL AND DENTISTS REGISTERS. In continuation of my previous circular letters on the
subject, I send you a list of names which were erased from and restored
to, the Medical Register by order of the General Medical Council at
the Session held on November 2-4, 1915. The attention of the Licensing Bodies is called to the
General Medical Council's Standing Orders, as set forth hereunder, in
regard to Erasures from the Medical Register and the Dentists Register:— The Council recommends that no person whose name has been
once removed from, and has not been restored to, the Medical Register
shall, without previous reference to the General Medical Council, be
admitted to Examination for any new Qualification, The Council recommends that no person whose name has been
once removed from, and has not been restored to, the Dentists Register
shall, without previous reference to the General Medical Council, be
admitted to Examination for any new Qualification— Alterations since the issue of the last printed List
dated June 4, 1915. Additions to List of Erasures, Medical Register. RAI, Dhanpat ex M.R.C.S. Eng. 1901; ex L.R.C.P. Lond. 1901.
BURKE, Ulick Joseph L., L.M. 1896, R.C.P. Irel.; L., L.M. 1896, R.C.S. Irel.
HAYNES, Edmund Lyall L.S.A. Lond. 1888; M.R.C.S. Eng. 1888;
L.R.C.P. Lond. 1888. Names removed from the List of Erasures from the
Medical Register on account of Restoration thereto. ORR, James Morrison M.D. R.U. Irel. 1882.
ROCHE, Thomas Francis L.F.P.S. Glasg. 1892. Dentists Register.
No change. A.J. COCKINGTON
Acting Registrar.
